news.t: VanEck Expands Emerging Market and Sector Investing Suites with Launch of India Select ETF (INDZ) and Communications Services TruSector ETF (TRUC)

overview.description: The VanEck Communication Services TruSector ETF (TRUC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in communication services equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in equity securities of communication services-related companies. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation through exposure to industries such as telecom, media, entertainment, and interactive services. TRUC was launched on Feb 18, 2026 and is issued by VanEck.

holdings.n: State Street Communication Services Select Sector SPDR ETF

data.title: VanEck Expands Emerging Market and Sector Investing Suites with Launch of India Select ETF (INDZ) and Communications Services TruSector ETF (TRUC)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck launches two ETFs, INDZ and TRUC, to further building out the firm's emerging markets equity and TruSector ETF suites, respectively.
